source: content/rom-truth/timed-delivery.json plus content/rom-truth/event-flags.json; names reskinned for Swagbound runtime

deliveries.sendMessage: Swag Express put the pie order on the wire.
deliveries.arrivalMessage: Swag Express steps out of the static with your Ward Pie.

deliveries.sendMessage: Swag Express took the delivery slip.
deliveries.arrivalMessage: Swag Express arrives with a stamped delivery slip.

deliveries.sendMessage: Swag Express sent a courier for the pickup.
deliveries.arrivalMessage: Swag Express arrives to close the pickup docket.

deliveries.sendMessage: A customer is heading this way.
deliveries.arrivalMessage: The customer arrives. The file gets heavier.

deliveries.sendMessage: A second customer is in motion.
deliveries.arrivalMessage: The second customer arrives and looks ready to testify.

deliveries.sendMessage: A third customer found the address.
deliveries.arrivalMessage: The third customer arrives with a bad stare and worse timing.

deliveries.sendMessage: A fourth customer is on the street.
deliveries.arrivalMessage: The fourth customer arrives. The room runs out of air.

deliveries.sendMessage: Swag Express put the trap paper on a fast truck.
deliveries.arrivalMessage: Swag Express delivers Zombie Paper with no questions asked.

deliveries.sendMessage: Swag Express logged the Pencil Eraser delivery.
deliveries.arrivalMessage: Swag Express arrives with the Pencil Eraser.

deliveries.sendMessage: Swag Express logged the Hawk Eye delivery.
deliveries.arrivalMessage: Swag Express arrives with the Hawk Eye.
